2604.12955.title: Modeling Copilots for Text-to-Model Translation
2604.12955.paper_summary: There is growing interest in leveraging large language models (LLMs) for text-to-model translation and optimization tasks. This paper aims to advance this line of research by introducing \textsc{Text2Model} and \textsc{Text2Zinc}. \textsc{Text2Model} is a suite of copilots based on several LLM strategies with varying complexity, along with an online leaderboard. \textsc{Text2Zinc} is a cross-domain dataset for capturing optimization and satisfaction problems specified in natural language, along with an interactive editor with built-in AI assistant. While there is an emerging literature on using LLMs for translating combinatorial problems into formal models, our work is the first attempt to integrate \textit{both} satisfaction and optimization problems within a \textit{unified architecture} and \textit{dataset}. Moreover, our approach is \textit{solver-agnostic} unlike existing work that focuses on translation to a solver-specific model. To achieve this, we leverage \textsc{MiniZinc}'s solver-and-paradigm-agnostic modeling capabilities to formulate combinatorial problems. We conduct comprehensive experiments to compare execution and solution accuracy across several single- and multi-call strategies, including; zero-shot prompting, chain-of-thought reasoning, intermediate representations via knowledge-graphs, grammar-based syntax encoding, and agentic approaches that decompose the model into sequential sub-tasks. Our copilot strategies are competitive, and in parts improve, recent research in this domain. Our findings indicate that while LLMs are promising they are not yet a push-button technology for combinatorial modeling. We contribute \textsc{Text2Model} copilots and leaderboard, and \textsc{Text2Zinc} and interactive editor to open-source to support closing this performance gap.
2604.12955.paper_summary_zh: 隨著對利用大型語言模型（LLMs）進行文本到模型翻譯和優化任務的興趣日益增加，本文旨在通過引入 \textsc{Text2Model} 和 \textsc{Text2Zinc} 來推進這一研究方向。 \textsc{Text2Model} 是一套基於多種 LLM 策略的副駕駛工具，具有不同的複雜性，並配有在線排行榜。 \textsc{Text2Zinc} 是一個跨領域數據集，用於捕捉以自然語言指定的優化和滿意度問題，並配有內置 AI 助手的互動編輯器。雖然關於使用 LLM 將組合問題翻譯成正式模型的文獻正在不斷增長，但我們的工作是首次嘗試在 \textit{統一架構} 和 \textit{數據集} 中整合 \textit{滿意度} 和 \textit{優化} 問題。此外，我們的方法是 \textit{解算器無關} 的，與現有專注於翻譯到特定解算器模型的工作不同。為了實現這一目標，我們利用 \textsc{MiniZinc} 的解算器和範式無關建模能力來制定組合問題。我們進行了全面的實驗，以比較多種單次和多次調用策略的執行和解決準確性，包括：零-shot 提示、思考鏈推理、通過知識圖的中介表示、基於語法的語法編碼，以及將模型分解為順序子任務的代理方法。我們的副駕駛策略具有競爭力，並在某些方面改善了該領域的近期研究。我們的研究結果表明，儘管 LLM 具有潛力，但它們尚未成為組合建模的即時技術。我們貢獻了 \textsc{Text2Model} 的副駕駛工具和排行榜，以及 \textsc{Text2Zinc} 和互動編輯器，並將其開源，以支持縮小這一性能差距。
2604.12955.author: Serdar Kadioglu et.al.
2604.12955.authors: Serdar Kadioglu, Karthik Uppuluri, Akash Singirikonda
